name: code-testing-validator
description: Runs full build/test + coverage-gap + a test-quality audit (test-gap-analysis, assertion-quality, test-anti-patterns), then routes the crew: fires loop_to back to implement (via the summary tool, resultType=changes_needed + NEEDS_WORK token, with categorized FAILING/MISSING/WEAK/SMELL feedback) when issues remain, or reports terminal when clean. Polyglot leaf stage: no crew grant; does not write tests.
